_about: Edit this file and run 'python build.py'. See palette.png for the color map.
_paths: base_rui = source (NEVER modified), out_rui = output file. Paths are relative to this folder. Put your launcher's original index.rui here as 'index.bak.rui'.
_auto_connect: Connect to a fixed server when the launcher opens. enabled=false to disable.
title: rage-ui
_colors: old hex -> new hex (lowercase). The demo below recolors the gold accent to teal; remove it to keep the original. See palette_reference for all groups, or palette.png.
_texts: Replace plain text in app.js + index.html. Each item is [old, new].
_images: Files in assets/images/ (img_XXX.jpg) are used automatically. To change an image, replace that file with your own (same name). The colorful placeholders show which slot appears where.
_server_list: override=true makes this list FULLY define the UI server list (master/cache4.bin is ignored). servers=[] -> empty list. Clicking connects to ip:port. Add [1.1] to a name to also show it under the '1.1' tab.
_server_entry: Add servers in order below. REQUIRED: name, ip, port. Optional (defaults applied): players, maxplayers, ping, lang, gamemode, url. Each server is a { } block, separated by commas.
